top_signals.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix has soared to a trillion-dollar market cap by serving some of the biggest names in technology, including Nvidia and Apple.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
